/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/core/cache_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/core/memory_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/core/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/net/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/net/resp_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/persistence/persistence_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/cluster/slot_map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/cluster/cluster_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/metrics/stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/metrics/http_stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/persistence/file_persistence.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/server/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/server/command_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/server/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/cluster/mysql_client.cpp.o -o miniredis  -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmysqlclient.so
